props.name: textAutoHide
props.description: Whether text content should auto-hide on hover

props.name: enableBorderGlow
props.description: Enable border glow effect that follows cursor

props.name: disableAnimations
props.description: Disable all animations (automatically enabled on mobile)

props.name: spotlightRadius
props.description: Radius of the spotlight effect in pixels

props.name: particleCount
props.description: Number of particles in the star animation

props.name: enableTilt
props.description: Enable 3D tilt effect on card hover

props.name: glowColor
props.description: RGB color values for glow effects (without rgba wrapper)

props.name: clickEffect
props.description: Enable ripple effect on card click

props.name: enableMagnetism
props.description: Enable subtle card attraction to cursor
